title: Siddhesvara Temple
tagline: Siddhesvara Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Siddhesvara Temple (also spelt Siddheshvara or Siddheshwara and locally called Purada Siddeshwara ) is located in Haveri in Haveri district, Karnataka state, India.
overview.description: The Siddhesvara Temple (also spelt Siddheshvara or Siddheshwara and locally called Purada Siddeshwara ) is located in Haveri in Haveri district, Karnataka state, India. It is considered an ornate example of 12th-century Western Chalukyan art and is well known for the many loose sculptures of Hindu deities that exist in it. However, inscriptional evidence would suggest that the initial consecration of the temple was in the late 11th century. An exciting aspect of the temple is that it faces west instead of facing the rising sun in the east–a standard in Chalukyan constructions.

topPlaces.name: Haveri
topPlaces.description: Haveri is a city and headquarters of Haveri district of Karnataka State in India. Haveri is famous for its cardamom garlands, Byadagi red chillies and Hukkeri Math.

topPlaces.name: Aladakatti
topPlaces.description: Aladakatti is a village in Dharwad district of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Agadi, Haveri
topPlaces.description: Agadi is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Haveri taluk of Haveri district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Devagiri, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Devagiri is the largest village in Haveri Taluk of Haveri district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is about 7.5 km (4.7 mi) north from the Haveri city in NH-4.

topPlaces.name: Anandavana
topPlaces.description: Anandavana Agadi is located near the city of Haveri, India adjacent to Agadi village. in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Devihosur
topPlaces.description: Devihosur is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Haveri taluk of Haveri district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Siddhesvara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Siddhesvara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Siddhesvara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Siddhesvara Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Siddhesvara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Siddhesvara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Siddhesvara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Siddhesvara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Haveri, Aladakatti, Agadi, Haveri, Devagiri, Karnataka, Anandavana.
